narrative:
Precinct Scioto South (precinct in Ross County) has 714 registered voters, with 67.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.2 percentage points.
